programs.title: ITV News London
programs.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programs.title: ITV Evening News
programs.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programs.title: For the Love of Dogs with Alison Hammond
programs.desc: Alison meets an excitable spaniel with a serious knee issue, a frustrated crossbreed desperate to use his nose, and helps teach sign language to a Staffy.

programs.title: Emmerdale
programs.desc: Jacob finally comes clean to Sarah. Dawn makes a confession to Moira. Paddy's anxious.

programs.title: Coronation Street
programs.desc: The police question their suspect's movements, Melanie piles the pressure onto Will, David shares his evidence with Kit, and another resident deletes some incriminating footage.

programs.title: A Taste for Murder
programs.desc: When Joe investigates the death of a tourist found at the bottom of a cliff, a baking lesson from Elena leads to the discovery of a clue that blows the case wide open.
